cases.prompt: 출시 전 점검 해줘 — 이 온보딩 플로우 페르소나 검증해줘

assertions.text: The response evaluates the onboarding flow against both general-user personas and domain-expert personas.
It scores accessibility and coverage for general-user personas and accuracy, risk, and best-practices for expert personas.
It produces a prioritized improvement backlog ordered by severity.

cases.prompt: Run an expert review panel on this deliverable before we ship it

assertions.text: The response assembles domain-expert personas and reviews the deliverable through them.
It flags accuracy, risk, and best-practices issues raised by the expert personas.
It returns concrete, prioritized improvement items rather than a pass/fail verdict.
The skill validates the target artifact against a diverse set of user and expert personas.
It outputs a prioritized improvement backlog covering accessibility, coverage, accuracy, and risk.
